text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Goal after goal, foreverrr. ♪ Winning the
souuul! ♪

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: WOOOW! That was so incredible! Sob! It was the greatest thing eveerrrr!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: It wasn't that emotional. Pretty good though...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
No—I'm doing my best to prepare for the concert,
but my singing is by no means up to par....

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: That's not true! Singing's all about heart! The two of you are both amazing!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I'm nothing special... You're the one with the huge
voice.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
You really think so, Taishin?! Ehehehe! Maybe
you're right!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
H-hey, that wasn't a compliment! I was just stating
a fact...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I was happy to hear it anyway! Hehehe. But you
really are good at this—you've got a great sense
of rhythm.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Hey, I've got an idea! Why don't we compete in
score mode? Let's each sing our best song! We're
all rivals in singing too, after all!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: We all got the same score!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
...Hm, sounds like they're calling to say our time's
almost up. I'll get it.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Hey, hey, hey! Why don't we finish up by singing
one last song together?! All right, I'm loading up
the track!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Heh, in a way, this result feels kind of... right, for
the three of us.
